pi_items.source: Verified against setup_task.sh which expects output at this path
File exists at benchmarks/cua_world/environments/freecad_envb/data/T8_housing_bracket.FCStd as verified via file inspection
Input file T8_housing_bracket.FCStd is 33,868 bytes = ~33.87 KB, verified by stat command on actual file

Official FreeCAD TechDraw documentation (https://wiki.freecad.org/index.php?title=TechDraw_SectionView/en) confirms these three object types are required to create a technical drawing with section view. TechDraw::DrawPage contains the views, TechDraw::DrawViewPart is the base view being sectioned, and TechDraw::DrawViewSection is the section view output.

pi_items.verified_value: Valid FreeCAD .FCStd file (ZIP archive) containing parametric mechanical part with PartDesign features (Pad, Hole, Pocket, PolarPattern)
pi_items.source: File verified as valid ZIP archive using file command; Document.xml parsed showing PartDesign::Body with 19 objects including sketches and features

pi_items.verified_value: Real mechanical part created by FreeCAD library contributor @hasecilu, not from FreeCAD-library repository
pi_items.source: Document.xml metadata shows CreatedBy and Company fields set to '@hasecilu'. Web search of FreeCAD-library did not confirm this specific file exists in that repository.

privileged_info_summary: The input file T8_housing_bracket.FCStd is a real, non-synthetic FreeCAD parametric 3D model of a T8 housing bracket, 33.87 KB in size, containing a PartDesign body with mechanical features. The output task expects to create a technical drawing with three required TechDraw objects: DrawPage (document container), DrawViewPart (base orthographic view), and DrawViewSection (cross-section view showing internal geometry). These object types are confirmed by FreeCAD documentation as the standard components needed for technical drawings with section views. The minimum output file size requirement of 10 KB is reasonable given the input file size and the additional TechDraw objects that will be created.
